handwritten_baselines.note: Framework scaffold is ready; handwritten baseline programs can be added incrementally.

estimation_assumptions.note: Costs are illustrative unless adapter-reported input/output tokens exist. Runtime uses AINL **source** tiktoken count × overhead; size uses **aggregate emitted** tiktoken count × overhead when metric is tiktoken.
